description_long: This church features a simple, rectangular structure with a prominent blue gabled roof and a white cross mounted at the front peak. The facade includes a small entrance vestibule with its own blue roof and double doors, flanked by tall, narrow windows. The main body of the building is white, with blue accents on the roof and window frames, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The side and rear views reveal additional rectangular extensions, likely for auxiliary rooms or halls, all unified by the same blue roofing. The windows are uniformly rectangular and lack ornate detailing, suggesting a functional, contemporary design. The overall form is compact and symmetrical, with minimal decorative elements aside from the cross.
description: A compact, white church with a blue gabled roof, front cross, and simple rectangular windows, featuring a small entrance vestibule.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a small vestibule, double doors, and a prominent cross atop the blue gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large blue roof, multiple rectangular windows, and the extension of the building to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back extension with a blue roof and the plain rear facade, lacking decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uninterrupted blue roof and the side wall with minimal window openings.
